education.titleText: Vidyakul-LIVE Learning App, State Board, NCERT
education.description: Vidyakul - Bharat's first live classes learning app for state board, NCERT , CBSE, serving the after school tuition needs for state board students via pre-recorded and free live lectures from the most prominent trusted local teachers. We cover course content for the class 9th to 12th for state board books, CBSE, NCERT solutions, Exam revision, IIT JEE, NEET.Vidyakul has 120+ Teachers on board, Daily Free Live Classes + 50,000+ Video lectures in Hindi, English, Hinglish, Marathi, Gujarati, Bengali, which is viewed by 1,00,000,00+ most engaged students. ........More Details

education.titleText: ClassKlap Learning App-Keep your learning going
education.description: To keep the learning going, ClassKlap bring the school and teachers to Student place through, ClassKlap Learning App. Students can join LIVE classes from the comfort of their home through this app. With the ClassKlap Learning App, parents can stay involved with their child's scholastic progress. The app enables schools to streamline all communication with parents. The schools can reach out to parents with home-work, planned activities, captured classroom moments, daily time tables......More Details

Study24x7 is a FREE app for individuals to learn from 50+ interests! Now interact, collaborate and learn from both your teachers and peers on the same platform.Study24x7 offers a unique and simple way of learning. Sign in on the app, choose your interest and voila! With the latest updates on your feed related to the interest selected, you get to learn from over 1000+ educators on our platform...........More Details

education.titleText: Smartkeeda-Best Ques Bank for Competitive Exams
education.description: Smartkeeda is Free and most updated Question Bank for almost all the major competitive exams - IBPS PO Pre and Mains, SBI PO Pre and Mains, IBPS SO, SBI SO, IBPS RRB Office Assistant Pre and Mains, IBPS RRB Officer Scale 1 Pre and Mains, SSC CGL Tier 1 and Tier 2, SSC CHSL, SSC MTS, UPSC CDSE, CTET, CLAT, MAT, NIFT, Railways, etc. .......More Details

Hispanic Tutellus is the world's largest online education platform. More than 3 million users, more than 600 thousand active students in 160 countries by over 70,000 Video course, allows us to offer any type of online course, Carrera or Title University. ............More Details
